arts.ttl: Declan Rice three-word message to Chris Kavanagh after Arsenal red card as new VAR audio released
arts.sum: Interestingly, Kavanagh and the VAR agreed that Rice should be given a second yellow card, with the referee heard saying: "I have no choice, he knocks the ball away." "Dec, you need to go I'm afraid," Kavanagh says as the Arsenal midfielder is told the decision stands following a VAR check.

arts.ttl: 42m Arsenal Star Spotted Back in Training After Injury
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Riccardo Calafiori has been spotted back in training after his injury.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice audio released as Howard Webb offers verdict on Arsenal controversy
arts.sum: Declan Rice was sent off against Brighton, leaving Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta in disbelief, with refereeing chief Howard Webb now wading into the debate over the decision

arts.ttl: 'Oh gosh': Ian Wright admits £51m Atalanta player really worries him ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Could he head to the Emirates one day? 👀

arts.ttl: VAR audio from Declan Rice red card incident reveals referee ‘didn’t like’ decision
arts.sum: Referee Chris Kavanagh said he was left with ‘no choice’ but to send Rice off in the 1-1 draw against Brighton

arts.ttl: ‘Watch the replay’: Pundit suggests the referee missed something during Tottenham vs Arsenal on Sunday
arts.sum: Arsenal beat Tottenham 1-0 on Saturday, but as ever, the north London derby wasn’t a game without controversy. Indeed, there were some arguments after the...

arts.ttl: Toto Schillaci in his own words: World Cup legend's last Mail Sport interview - where he revealed he's an Arsenal fan - after his death aged 59
arts.sum: Back in 2020, Mail Sport spoke with Schillaci about briefly becoming one of the most famous people in sport, finishing second in the Ballon d'Or runnings and his surprise affection for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Nwaneri to start, Sterling decision and Timber injury concern - Arsenal changes vs Atalanta - Tom Canton - football.london
arts.sum: Yet the Dutch international missed the chance to start the opening game of the season as the club managed a load-bearing injury following his recovery from a major knee issue - that concern has not disappeared and managing his minutes this week are vital. Arsenal changes vs Atalanta: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Nwaneri, Saka, Havertz, Sterling

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans will love legend’s response to Harry Kane’s Champions League feat
arts.sum: Harry Kane became the first English player to score four goals in a Champions League match on Tuesday as he netted a quadruple for Bayern Munich in their astonishing 9-2 victory over Dinamo Zagreb at the Allianz Arena. Kane, who moved to Bayern for €95 million from Tottenham in a blockbuster 2023 transfer, the most expensive deal in the history of the Bundesliga giants, is the first player from his country to score as many in a single European Cup game since Alan Smith for Arsenal in 1991.

arts.ttl: Report: Atalanta now set to have ‘absolutely outstanding’ player unavailable to face Arsenal in Champions League tie
